evidence_summary: HSBC USA is wholly owned by HSBC North America Holdings, which is indirectly wholly owned by HSBC Holdings plc.
scope_note: Relationship verified for the SEC v3 historical scope; 2019-01-01 is the pipeline scope boundary, not the corporate relationship inception date.
